mapper.select: SELECT c.contract_id, c.customer_id, cu.name AS customerName, c.insured_id, ip.name AS insuredName, c.product_name, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.status, c.reg_date FROM contract c JOIN customer cu ON c.customer_id = cu.customer_id JOIN insured_person ip ON c.insured_id = ip.insured_id ORDER BY c.contract_id DESC

SELECT c.contract_id, c.customer_id, cu.name AS customerName, c.insured_id, ip.name AS insuredName, c.product_name, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.status, c.reg_date FROM contract c JOIN customer cu ON c.customer_id = cu.customer_id JOIN insured_person ip ON c.insured_id = ip.insured_id WHERE c.contract_id = #{contract_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO contract ( customer_id, insured_id, product_name, start_date, end_date, status ) VALUES ( #{customer_id}, #{insured_id}, #{product_name}, #{start_date}, #{end_date}, #{status} )
mapper.update: UPDATE contract SET customer_id = #{customer_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, insured_id = #{insured_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, product_name = #{product_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, start_date = #{start_date, jdbcType=DATE}, end_date = #{end_date, jdbcType=DATE}, status = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE contract_id = #{contract_id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
